title: aspidium truncatum var. keffordii
intro: Aspidium truncatum var. keffordii, also known as the Kefford's Lady fern, is a variety of fern native to New South Wales in Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of the Kefford's Lady fern include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant was used in herbal preparations, including infusions and poultices, to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
